---
name: Pipeline Enhancement
about: Suggest an improvement to the content pipeline
title: "[Enhancement] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Which part of the pipeline?

- [ ] New agent
- [ ] Existing agent improvement (specify which)
- [ ] Quality gates
- [ ] Pipeline orchestration
- [ ] Analytics integration
- [ ] Output format
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## What problem does this solve?

Describe the limitation or gap in the current pipeline.

## Proposed solution

How would you improve it? Be specific about:
- Which files would change
- What new behaviour would be added
- How it interacts with existing agents

## Example use case

Show a concrete scenario where this enhancement would help.

```
/content-pipeline "example topic"
# Currently: [what happens now]
# With enhancement: [what would happen instead]
```

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you think about?

## Impact on existing pipelines

Would this change break any existing workflows? If so, how would you handle migration?

## Additional context

Any other information, mockups, or references.
